basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 Research Assistant Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Candidates with Master’s in Public Health / Sociology / Social Work / Anthropology / Microbiology / Zoology / Health Science/Msc in zoology life science OR equivalent Graduate in Science / Sociology / Social Work / Anthropology / Microbiology / Zoology / Health Science from a recognized University with three years of work experience from a recogniz

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s in Public Health / Sociology / Social Work / Anthropology / Microbiology / Zoology / Health Science/Msc in zoology life science OR equivalent Graduate in Science / Sociology / Social Work / Anthropology / Microbiology / Zoology / Health Science from a recognized University with three years of work experience from a recognized institution
qualification.details: Master’s in Public Health / Sociology / Social Work / Anthropology / Microbiology / Zoology / Health Science/Msc in zoology life science OR equivalent Graduate in Science / Sociology / Social Work / Anthropology / Microbiology / Zoology / Health Science from a recognized University with three years of work experience from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Research Assistant. AIIMS Jodhpur is looking to fill one vacancy for this position.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Research Assistant post announced by AIIMS Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates should have a Master’s degree in Public Health, Sociology, Social Work, Anthropology, Microbiology, Zoology, Health Science, or an equivalent degree in Science with three years of work experience.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Research Assistant position will be held on 09 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview venue is at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur, Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific documents like ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates are also required.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.
